name: POS API
description: Backend framework to manage POS transactions and inventory, with complex logic like recommendation and estimation.

name: Admin Panel
description: Old-fashioned admin panel using PHP CodeIgniter, then developing a new one using Next.js. Uses Casbin as the authorization library.

name: OpenERP (Odoo)
description: Developing, maintaining, and customizing OpenERP (Odoo) to meet the needs of clients.

name: Minecraft Addon
description: Developing a custom Minecraft addon to enhance gameplay, add features, create commands, and handle multi-server interactions.

name: Discord Bot
description: Developing a custom Discord bot to enhance server interactions and automate tasks with music tools. Integrated the API using Django as the backend.

name: Password Management Website
description: Developing a password management website to securely store and manage user credentials, with Google auth and 2FA login methods.
